ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "half" INTEGER /* Half of the game in which the play occurred */,
  "time_remaining_half" TEXT /* Time remaining in the half when the play started */,
  "secs_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the half when the play started */,
  "secs_remaining_absolute" INTEGER /* Absolute seconds remaining in the game when the play started */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score at the start of the play */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score at the start of the play */,
  "score_diff" INTEGER /* Score differential at the start of the play */,
  "play_length" INTEGER /* Length of the play in seconds */,
  "win_prob" REAL /* Win probability for the home team at the start of the play */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "home_time_out_remaining" INTEGER /* Timeouts remaining for the home team */,
  "away_time_out_remaining" INTEGER /* Timeouts remaining for the away team */,
  "home_timeout_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for home team timeout taken during the play */,
  "away_timeout_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for away team timeout taken during the play */,
  "home_favored_by" INTEGER /* Point spread or favored amount for the home team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., shot, turnover, foul, free throw) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., 2-point, 3-point, layup, dunk) */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "shot_angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot relative to the basket */,
  "shot_result" TEXT /* Result of the shot (e.g., made, missed) */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of foul (e.g., personal, technical) */,
  "foul_result" TEXT /* Result of the foul (e.g., shooting, non-shooting) */,
  "possession_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with possession at the start of the play */,
  "possession_change" INTEGER /* Indicates if possession changed during the play */,
  "lead_change" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lead changed during the play */,
  "momentum_shift" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was a significant momentum shift during the play */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds in the play */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the play */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals in the play */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the play */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers in the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_possession_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("possession_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the game in minutes */,
  "home_team_win_prob" REAL /* Win probability for the home team at the end of the game */,
  "away_team_win_prob" REAL /* Win probability for the away team at the end of the game */,
  "game_rating" REAL /* Rating or quality of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "year" TEXT /* Player's year in college */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "recruitment_rank" INTEGER /* Player's recruitment ranking */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Player's injury status */,
  "stats_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's detailed stats page */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Player's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_participants" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the play */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player involved in the play */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the play */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken by the player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the player's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id", "player_id")
)
